upcomingMeetings.title: Agent Suggestion
upcomingMeetings.description: I noticed you have a meeting scheduled for tomorrow that conflicts with another high-priority commitment. Would you like me to help reschedule?
upcomingMeetings.explanation: The agent monitors your calendar and proactively suggests scheduling optimizations based on meeting priorities, participant availability, and your typical working patterns.

actionItems.explanation: Action items are automatically extracted from meeting transcripts using AI. The agent identifies concrete tasks with high confidence levels and can sync them to your project management tools.

projectInsights.explanation: The agent tracks project mentions across meetings and correlates them with your task management system to provide real-time project health insights.

goalAlignment.explanation: By analyzing company objectives and market signals, the agent helps ensure your daily work aligns with strategic priorities.

confidence.high: High confidence - explicitly mentioned in meeting
confidence.medium: Medium confidence - inferred from discussion context
confidence.low: Low confidence - possible action item, needs verification
